summary: A Ukrainian female drone operator known as "Tucha," formerly an esports player, joined the "Burevestnik" unmanned systems regiment after nine years of gaming experience. In Kharkiv region, Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish AHS Krab self-propelled howitzer using an optical fiber FPV drone called "Provod." Ukrainian interceptor drones have become a key element of short-range air defense, successfully intercepting numerous Russian UAVs, according to Commander-in-Chief Syrskyi. Meanwhile, Russian forces reported destroying 88 Ukrainian targets in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction on March 7, 2026, while Ukrainian drone operators struggle to meet Defense Minister targets due to reduced enemy presence within range.
